title: Shieldless UHC Tier Tagger
description: allows you to choose tiers from shieldless, mctiers, subtiers, and pvptiers.
body:
# Tier Testing is back, although all tiers are reset. Join the discord by using this [link](https://discord.gg/kfgDWuCTV8). Also any version before 2.0 will not work.

# Intro
This mod is a tier tagger for the Shieldless UHC Tierlist. If you want to know more about this tierlist/kit, join the [discord](https://discord.gg/kfgDWuCTV8) or visit the [website](https://shieldlessuhc.vercel.app/).

**Note:** This mod is a fork of the [Tiers](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiers) mod made by Flavio6561. I do not take credit for any of the code besides the Shieldless UHC part.

If you run into any bugs or issues, either contact me on discord @pheological or leave an issue in github.

#### Older versions of this mod will not be maintained once Hoplite drops support for them during major updates, as most of the player base on this tierlist plays on it.

# FAQ
## Why is my tier not being displayed?
This could be for a multitude of reasons; it typically happens when the API is being rate limited or there are issues with it. It could also be that your account's IGN has not been updated for a while (happens to people who've tested a long time ago and have changed their IGN). To fix this, join the [discord](https://discord.gg/kfgDWuCTV8) and relink your account by entering your IGN in the [request-tests channel](https://discord.com/channels/1247165254203609179/1248761291808575548).

## How do I configure this and check other players' tiers?
To check others profiles, simply run `/tiers [IGN]`. To configure the mod, you can run `/tiers -config`, or if you use Mod Menu you can access it through that as well.

## My tier has not updated. How do I fix it?
This mod downloads the list of everyone tested through the API on launch. Because of this, tiers will only update after launch. If your tier hasn't updated, simply relaunch your game.
